scripts.type-check: npm --prefix packages/contracts run type-check && npm --prefix apps/web run type-check
scripts.clean: npm --prefix packages/contracts run clean && npm --prefix apps/web run clean && node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('.turbo', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('node_modules', { recursive: true, force: true });"
